_note: This is the standalone frontend-only manifest. For the full-stack deployment (recommended), use the root privateprompt-app.json in the n0crm monorepo.
name: n0CRM Frontend
description: n0CRM SPA frontend — nginx serving the React app, proxying /api/* to the n0CRM API service.

post_install.description: Static frontend served by nginx. Set N0CRM_API_URL to the internal URL of the n0CRM API service (default: http://n0crm-api:3001). Deploy the n0crm-api app first.
